indications.text:
___________________ ____________________
ORAVIG is an azole antifungal indicated for the local treatment of DRUG INTERACTIONS
oropharyngeal candidiasis in adults (1). Warfarin: Miconazole may enhance anticoagulant effect. Monitor
prothrombin time, INR, and watch for bleeding (7.1).
